name: PlayFab (Microsoft)
description: PlayFab (Microsoft) — Azure-backed game backend with 100+ services: economy, analytics, matchmaking, and live-ops.

seo.title: PlayFab (Microsoft) — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: PlayFab (Microsoft): PlayFab (Microsoft) — Azure-backed game backend with 100+ services: economy, analytics, matchmaking, and live-ops.

when_to_use: Azure-integrated game backend for Xbox, PC, and mobile
100+ LiveOps services including matchmaking and economy
Azure PlayFab Multiplayer for game session orchestration
Player analytics integrated with Azure Data and AI services
Enterprise game backend for large studios on Microsoft stack

cons: Docs sprawl across Azure and PlayFab
review.verdict: The most comprehensive game BaaS around, worth the complexity for live-service titles.
review.best_for: Studios shipping live-service games needing deep analytics, economy, and matchmaking out of box
review.not_for: Small casual titles or indies overwhelmed by 100+ services
